positive: A stylized, whimsical celestial woodland scene. Focus on a grouping of interconnected elements: glowing bioluminescent mushrooms forming natural arches, suspended glowing fireflies, and gentle, stylized forest fauna like foxes and deer silhouettes peering through overgrown, vine-covered trees. The color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant emerald green, cosmic purple, and ethereal gold accents. The composition must be highly centralized, emphasizing strong contrasts between light and shadow. Style: Modern minimalist gothic illustration, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. High detail, clean outlines, negative space emphasized. Cinematic volumetric lighting.
